
---

## `analysis/trackB_singleROI/03_lme_and_delta_link.qmd`

```markdown
---
title: "Track B (single-ROI): LME change + ΔΔ link to outcome"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose
Inferential models aligned to a single-feature focused analysis:
- LME: ROI_mean ~ baseline_age × time (+ group terms)
- Change-score link: ΔY ~ ΔROI (plus covariates)
- Optional diagnostics plots

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(readr)
library(here)

source(here::here("R", "lme_helpers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "change_estimands.R"))
source(here::here("R", "diagnostics_helpers.R"))

in_dir <- here::here("outputs", "trackB_singleROI")
out_dir <- in_dir

dat_roi_only <- readRDS(file.path(in_dir, "dat_roi_only_long_2waves.rds"))
dat_roi_y    <- readRDS(file.path(in_dir, "dat_roi_y_long_2waves.rds"))

# ---- 1) LME models (random intercept only) ----
# Core: baseline age × time
m_core <- fit_lme_single_roi(
  dat = dat_roi_only,
  formula = ROI_mean ~ Age0_c * Time_years + (1 | ID)
)

# Add group terms (e.g., sex differences in change)
m_group <- fit_lme_single_roi(
  dat = dat_roi_only,
  formula = ROI_mean ~ Age0_c * Time_years + Sex + Time_years:Sex + (1 | ID)
)

# Optional 3-way: does age-dependence of change differ by group?
m_3way <- fit_lme_single_roi(
  dat = dat_roi_only,
  formula = ROI_mean ~ Age0_c * Time_years * Sex + (1 | ID)
)

# Save summaries
capture.output(summary(m_core),  file = file.path(out_dir, "LME_core_summary.txt"))
capture.output(summary(m_group), file = file.path(out_dir, "LME_group_summary.txt"))
capture.output(summary(m_3way),  file = file.path(out_dir, "LME_3way_summary.txt"))

# Model comparisons (LRT; ML fit)
capture.output(anova(m_core, m_group), file = file.path(out_dir, "LME_core_vs_group_LRT.txt"))
capture.output(anova(m_group, m_3way), file = file.path(out_dir, "LME_group_vs_3way_LRT.txt"))

# Tidy fixed effects table
fx_tbl <- bind_rows(
  broom.mixed::tidy(m_core,  effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>% mutate(model = "core"),
  broom.mixed::tidy(m_group, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>% mutate(model = "group"),
  broom.mixed::tidy(m_3way,  effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>% mutate(model = "3way")
)
write_csv(fx_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "LME_fixed_effects_tidy.csv"))

fx_tbl

# LME diagnostics plots (Optional)
# These are generic plots (resid vs fitted, QQ, histogram).
save_lme_diagnostics(m_core,  file.path(out_dir, "LME_core_diagnostics.png"))
save_lme_diagnostics(m_group, file.path(out_dir, "LME_group_diagnostics.png"))

#ΔΔ link: change–change association (wide format)
# Build wide paired dataset (T1/T2) for change scores
wide <- dat_roi_y %>%
  select(ID, Sex, Age0, Age0_c, time_point, Y, ROI_mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = time_point,
    values_from = c(Y, ROI_mean),
    names_prefix = "t"
  )

# Compute multiple change estimands (raw/%/log/abs) for Y and ROI
wide_chg <- add_change_estimands(
  wide = wide,
  vars = c("Y", "ROI_mean"),
  t1_suffix = "t0",
  t2_suffix = "t1"
)

write_csv(wide_chg, file.path(out_dir, "wide_change_estimands.csv"))

# Primary (simple) ΔΔ link using raw signed change:
lm_raw <- lm(dY_raw ~ dROI_mean_raw + Age0 + Sex, data = wide_chg)
capture.output(summary(lm_raw), file = file.path(out_dir, "LM_dY_on_dROI_raw_summary.txt"))

# Optional: run across all estimands for ROI and Y (robustness)
lm_tbl <- run_change_link_models(
  wide_chg = wide_chg,
  outcome_prefix = "dY",
  predictor_prefix = "dROI_mean",
  covars = c("Age0", "Sex")
)
write_csv(lm_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "LM_change_link_all_estimands.csv"))

lm_tbl

# Optional: ΔΔ plot (raw change)
p <- ggplot(wide_chg, aes(x = dROI_mean_raw, y = dY_raw)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Change–change association (single-feature)",
    x = "Δ Feature/ROI (raw)",
    y = "Δ Outcome (raw)"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "delta_link_scatter_raw.png"),
       p, width = 7.5, height = 6, dpi = 300)

p
